allSentences: Hello, Heimdall. How is your watch going?

elements.answerText: It must be exhausting to be always on guard.
Why are only these portals open?

allSentences: Fate has decreed it so. Not every path can be travelled at once.
Always alert, Skuld. The Bifröst never rests, and neither do I.
The portals are open. Each one will take you to a different challenge.

elements.answerText: What will I dinf on the other side?

allSentences: I see everything and hear everything. It is my duty, and I fulfill it without hesitation.
Echoes of battle... and enemies who wish for your fall. Be prepared.
Then go on. Step closer to a portal and walk toward your destiny.
You focus on protecting the realms. I'll make sure nothing crosses without my permission.
Ay Skuld aiuda aiuda
Loki, what are you doing here?
Ah, Skuld... The Valkyrie charged with saving the Nine Realms. What a promising spectacle.
Hela has spread corruption throughout Asgard. And her herald... has black wings and a bitter memory.
Me, plotting? I just enjoy watching the threads of fate become entangled. Pure chaos... delicious.
Ha, ha. Trusting me is always a risk... but it´s also fun, don´t you think?

elements.answerText: Leave me alone, Loki. I´m going to Asgard.

allSentences: Then cross the portal. Asgard awaits you... if you dare.
Dúrkal, why can´t I hear your strings vibrating?
The forests of Alfheim have stopped singing.
Yes. Her shadow spreads, and the dark elves march al her call.
Sweet Idunn has been captured... locked away in a Nhar-Du.
One by one, they fall into darkness. But they still wait... for a spark of hope.

elements.answerText: Play again, Durkal. I´ll take care of Alfheim.

allSentences: My strings will vibrate for you, Skuld. May their echo guide you in battle.
Manny! What happened to you?
Skuld... Jotunheim is under attack.
I´ve been through worse storms... but this time the frost bites right through to the bone.

elements.answerText: What about Jotunheim´s army of giants?

allSentences: Hela´s forces are corrupting my brothers. Those who don´t fall... turn against us.
I don´t know. I didn´t see her... but I felt her shadow stretching across the ice. From her came her servants.

elements.answerText: Rest, Manny. I´ll take care of this.

allSentences: Skuld... don´t let it catch you too. That shadow not only corrupts bodies... it also bends the will.
Welcome to The Forge, Skuld. Nothing beats dwarven steel; even your turrets were forged here.
Denir nerver changes. If he´s not hammering steel, he´s thinking about how to put legs on a turret. You´ll see!
Real weapons are the ones you wield in battle. Not those machines that fight for you.
No enemy shall set foot in Valhalla.
Not all dwarves forge steel... some, like me, wield it in battle.
Thank you, Skuld. I felt corruption extinguishing my light... but your hands brought me back ti life
Let´s drink to victory... or to survival, whichever comes first.
Every step you take strengthens the threads of destiny. Keep going, Skuld... there is still much to weave.
Something is stirring in the realms... and I don´t like the sound of it.
Always alert, Skuld. The Bifröst never rests, and neither do I.
I see everything and hear everything. It is my duty, and I fulfill it without hesitation.
Fate has decreed it so. Not every path can be travelled at once.
The portals are open. Each one will take you to a different challenge.
